segments.text: Odeh, odeh, odeh, odeh.
Udhal panav raha soliye na
Odeh, odeh, odeh, odeh.
Odeh, odeh, odeh, odeh
Odeh, odeh, odeh, odeh
Kaila bho kala aaja suhandha
Odeh, odeh, odeh, odeh
Kaila bho kala aaja suhandha
Ambe udeh
Thirty years back, thirty years back when Sahasrara was opened,
I found darkness all over.
People were so ignorant, they had no awareness what
They have to find?
Of course!
...I've found that they wanted
To find something that was unknown
But...they did not know
What is the unknown
And what do we need to find
And there are extremely ignorant people
About themselves and about their surroundings
and about the aim of their life, I didn't know how to start
that topic with them. When Sahasrara was opened
i thought up trying Self Realization only on one lady
She is an old Lady
And there's another Lady who also started coming
This Old Lady got her realization
And then the another lady, who was much younger – she told Me that She gets fits and She
get possessed.
Oh My God!
I said how will i give her realization?
But somehow She got cured very fast…and She also caught Her Realization.
It's a Very unknown knowledge Also human beings in their ego do not want to accept
that they are not yet complete,
and have to have their realization.
Also the style of life was such
as there had no time for themselves
I found it very difficult
To convince people
you must take your Self-realization
because
They thought
It is something imaginary
Very far fetched
And they only believed in gurus who would say, all right do this much of ritual karma
can't.
That's it and there were doing all kinds rituals with the kind guidance from their
gurus without knowing that you have to first know yourself which is said by all
great incarnations, all the saints.
Clearly it is not that
It was only My idea
That people should get their Self-realization
But if you look at the idea of all those
People they said one after another
For centuries let's seek yourself
Even Christ said know thyself
Mohammed Sahib said the same
Nanak sahib said the same
But nobody tried to know that these rituals are not the end of life, they will not serve
purpose and you have realization.
So those two ladies only got Realization
And with this I thought let's go to sea shore
And about thirty people came with Me and they were talking in a very funny manner as to
how can get Self-realization, that don't deserve it.
They have not been good people – all kinds of things condemning themselves!
And in that lot I got about 12 people altogether, inclusive of these two ladies who've got Realization.
This is a sign
That the movement
Of knowing yourself
Is very-very slow
and People don't understand why should they know themselves
It was quite disappointing
Because nobody understood Me
But one day it so happened
in one of the programs, one lady came. She was possessed and she started talking
In Sanskrit language
–she just a maidservant-
everybody were surprised
And she said
You don't know who is
Then she started describing me
from the Soundarela area
I wondering what's matter with this lady
Like man she spoke
Her voice was like a man.
People may believe it or not, but she very possessed
and then they started asking her
And the came an asked Me Mother what She's saying is true
I said you should find out yourself
because those days people were such
that if You tell them anything Like That
They would turn their faces
Only kind of false gurus who will say all right
You give Me five rupees, they'll be very happy that you can purchase the Guru now.
They don't have to bother about anything."
We didn' t haveto do anythin'.
So with tha gradually it started working out
and I remember
these people who got Realization
asked me,"Mother will allow us to do Durga Puja?"
Durgapuja was regarded as something
And the Brahmins were normally not ready to do it, because they were not realized souls.
So there used get into fits and all kinds of problems so called the brahmin's – seven
of them and told him, you just don't worry.
Nothing will happen to your because now we are facing the reality it's not some sort
a murti puja or anything its human being they were quite frightened but something
happened with great confidence this started all the mantras everything the vibration started
flowing everywhere. Even now we were very close to the sea, I found that the sea was
roaring but people didn't understand except for these seven people they said nothing happened
with us – We did everything so well!
And think this is first miracle of Sahaja Yoga
See there's trouble in human mind at
level or at this time, is that they have too much of self-importance and think no end
themselves. So already we are great – what's there to know ourselves? We
power is humility.
If you think that You know everything,
we cannot humble down and We can not seek
Even if they don't want to follow anybody's path
They say,"We have our own paths
And will do whatever we wish to do."
I faced many people in different countries
who just came to listen
to My lecture, that's all. But they wouldn't take Realization and some of them did
take Realization – did! They got it but they got lost. Somehow this was such a funny
story for Me…that I am giving them Realization …I'm taking no money
for it nothing, I used to travel on My own.
But despite that why is It?
That the people don't realize The value of Self-realization."
Then a gentleman who got Realization in his first lot he told Me this today Is a consumer
society as they call it whatever its that unless and until you take money from them
they will never value it.
Let them feel that we have paid for our Realization,
so at the gate only you should keep somebody to take money
otherwise there would not be anything.
I said but You cannot sell it, its falsehood
–You can't sell Self-Realization
He says then see you won' t be successful
with other gurus this is main thing
and just accept
The money, even they tell them people bring so much to this one there is a feast and that's
how only the ego is satisfied.
And people take false people – these falsehoods may be realized later on because they suffer
a lot with all kinds of physical mental problems but by their time they are gone.
Now this Sastrara has not been yet described in any one of the books, though they have
talked about it.
In our ancient books –in India also–they've talked
sastra but nobody had described except that
It has 1000 petals at least if
They'd mentioned something
About it would be easier for me to show
That see this is written
in the book, because people are like that.
It has to be written into some books and only they accept it's a very difficult situation
– nobody had given any collective realization so no one wrote about Kundalini but I wouldn't
But I was thinking how these people who are lost here and there under some sort of a seeking,
what will happen to them?
And How Will i be able To give Them Self-realization?
Experiences were so horrid but doesn't matter.
I went on and on, and worked it out.
Of course we met some people who were also very cruel
nasty – who troubled Me
and troubled Sahaja Yogis
All these things should have really dampened my enthusiasm
but the contrary
i started thinking why? Why are People like this?
Then realized one thing
that we cannot have the whole world to get Self-realization.
This is The Last Judgment,
at this time people
will decide what's most important thing
they'll know themselves
and understand what they've got
it not just having a big number
which would help us
but really solid Sahaja Yoga
Then I found there were people who got cured of many diseases, but most of them got lost.
Some of the whom where drug addicts gave up drugs addiction – drinking they give
up smoking and so on…
I never said a word that you give up this or give up there.
Once the Kundalini rises, they will automatically give-up and it happened
And thats how people became so clean
So beautiful
started enjoying their life
But nobody would believe them
When went round to talk with other people
They say oh! You have gone mad
They couldn't believe how they have stopped drinking,
How are not smoking.
Then we want to drink!
Now what is this?
See so the identification I found
of these people were mostly
with a very loose type
Of enjoyment
The enjoyed very lose type
which had nothing do it spirit
Gradually, of course it started working out but still I must say that we can't expect
in this Kali Yuga to have billions and millions people is Sahaja Yoga.
Though It's my desire – Is your Desire!
And you want them get their Self-realization by which so many good things happen firstly
your physical self improves. Many people have been cured, Christ cured only twenty-one
people who I don't know how many thousands had been cured with Sahaja Yoga? Also there's
another very big problem in human beings that they read all kinds of books and they
no clear-cut idea as to what they should find.
What is their seeking?
It's a very big problem, and whatever it in one book will try follow that – I mean
like there shifting type of people!
They shift from one another…and then progress into Sahaja Yoga is much more difficult
…very difficult because if you are going on the path and start shifting form one
to another, you may go back.
But in that they find it is their freedom – actually without Realization!
You don't have your freedom of anything.
Freedom is that which…you know what are capable or in the freedom who should receive
all blessings?
If these blessings arenot there then we're not free and something wrong somewhere
in your own life, because once you get Realization
You become absolutely free people.
Free means Your Own Spirit guides you
The spirit as we know is the reflection of
the Divine God Almighty
If everybody has
the same reflection and is awakened, then in awareness it works as if they know what
right or wrong. What's constructive & destructive? It isn't some sort of a false satisfaction
that you have but in reality...you feel the reality and this has to happen. The first
in Sahaja Yoga that you get the experience, experience of feeling the spandh or kudra
breeze on your fingertips. Without this experience we should not believe anything! That means
a new dimension has come now –in our nerves-that
And you can feel the system which has been not known to you.
Sympathetic nervous-system was there, but we never knew how it is working!
The knowledge about yourself were so poor – But after realization suddenly
Suddenly the whole thing got enlightened, suddenly you started feeling it – the newness
among us.
Still sometimes we have to fight your ego and get over our ignorance of things because
Realization gives absolute knowledge…absolute knowledge!
It cannot be challenged….it's single as a egg may or something and when
get that knowledge, then you can tally it also.
You find out if this is correct or not."
This something has happened to all of us and we have already got those vibrations with
which one feels.
For example there may be some dissatisfied souls in Sahaja Yoga but who are those people
What are they doing?
On vibrations you can make out if those people have reached that state of reality or not.
You could make it, these who try to oppose and tell something else how far is the distance
on your fingertips this what is Kiyama about which Mohammed Sahab has said
The other day, I must tell you an experience where there was one fellow who came from the
television and known as Star.
And he started asking Me very funny questions which had no relevance – his name was Abbas
so…
So I said,"Abbas Mya!
You are wasting your time in my times will come to right question?"
So he said, I am against all fundamentalism.
But i'm not fundamentally.
How do you know that or no?
so He said
I trying to find out alright
As if You put your hands towards Me
Now Mohammed Sahab has said
at the time of Kiama Your Hands will speak
and immediately started feeling cool breeze on His hand
He said, what's happening to Me? I say that is not it.
No use arguing!
no Use talking about It
,no Use enquiry
Just see yourself the experiences
he just got so stunned
and after That whatever
he talked To me never published
So What am saying
if The people reach the truth
And they know this Is the Truth
Nothing can change them, if they have reached the program center.
You see in life of all great people that
They think this is a truth not by just reading
or noy only believing but as an experience
That on their central nervous system
Then it's impossible to change them
Like you can see a seed becomes the tree, then
You cannot make that tree into a seed. Seed is
A seed and but when
The seed changes in to
Tree Then
Can not bring it back
To the seed which may create
More seeds are different so
In same way once
We have got your realization
And Once we become one
With the divine
Than there
Is no question of
you going down unless and until yourself want to go down.
It's very, very remarkable how You get this property –
How do We get these ability
And this capability
After that we don't lose it
Of course first one must grow
For them they have to meditate
But in meditation once you do
The whole being itself gets so enlightened and is beautiful that you don't want to
change it.
You want be there, enjoy forever but of course if one give others because see your enjoying
too much like on the street somebody starving then feel like giving food in same way people
People are madly seeking, running up and down doing all kinds of things.
They want to tell them – they may believe or not believe it!
They might try sort-of absolutely deny you, defy also defile
You can do anything but if know for definite that
YOU ARE ON THE RIGHT PATH, YOU ARE ON THE RIGHT STATE OF MIND
which is a sahaja state
In Sanskrit it is called sahaja avastha, in sahajavasta you do not react.
You just see and appreciate – now I saw such a beautiful idea of Sahastrara all the
chakras they have crossed over gone up there from that very good expression but any
this color combination was not good, why did they use these?
Why don't They Use something else?"
Like that you see finding faults with others.
And This Finding Fault actually comes from your brain
which is Not yet enlightened
You cannot enjoy anything
because Your react all the time you won´t react
If somebody says Something nice still you are reacting
If somebody said something bad, of course you are reacting.
No question!
So for us to understand that we're not free to react –we aren't that cheap
to do it– on a very high pedestal—what is our job?
It's enjoy everything and enjoyment is the blessing
even you can enjoy the turmoil, the torture.
Everything that you see is the point
nothing happens to your spirit
which is a real light
whatever you may suffer
what ever you think is troubling
actually this silent light of the Spirit
It makes you absolutely, perfectly joyous and You give joy to others.
You don't design it –you do not plan in how
To Give Joy but just automatically give joy
And this giving of joy is also effortless
Surge because we are in the Sahaja state
In the Sahajya state
We see things
It's a drama you feel, it is different styles, different types and just see and watch
And get the joy out of them.
Its not important to say I like this or that no?
That I which likes nothing but ego and keeps us from the enjoyment
Everything in this world that you find is troublesome.
If You see from another angle, from a sahaja sthiti
,you won't feel the troubles but
That higher life should be there
.That higher standard
Should Be built-in within you
The other day I had meeting with the bureaucrats
And I told them, �I know the pay is less.� You may think that others get much more pain.
They are having many facilities but there's one way you can really enjoy your work if
have patriotism, desha bhakti. If you have patriotism for your country no amount of sacrifice
will satisfy you – want to give everything and can go through all kinds so-called dearth
or depressive states without even feeling anything about it! And at the same time
your feelings become very deep.
For example, you are travelling and suddenly
You find somebody who is sick
–you can feel it on your vibrations that this person is sick
And immediately Your sympathy
& Your love flows to That Person
—You try help That Person
If possible even cure That Person
Just like THAT
You see, the whole being becomes like an ocean which absorbs all rivers and all kinds of
watery things – whatever it is within its abdomen I should say.
It just takes all that's there but doesn't hurt you or trouble him!
He's like an over-powering person with his love.
he doesn't show His power,
and does not bother about self-importance
If somebody tries to insult you
what is there the insult part of it?
And such people who have reached that Sahaja Avastha
are greatest creators in art
music
great thoughts
And that's why these survive.
So many people write, but it goes out
so may people create
But nobody bothers
Those who are realized soul
whatever they created is of eternal nature
because there now in the ocean of eternity
They're on an ocean of purity
where there is no idea at all of hurting anyone or troubling anyone.
Such a protection in their for them, they cannot be harmed because afterall you are
entered into the Kingdom Of God so who can dare harm You and trouble You?
Such a prosperity I've seen among Sahaja Yogis and such generosity that they have,
And so much understanding about things.
I don't have to give lectures, now – Don' t do this and don''t that, you know.
And those who are not yet already matured in Sahaja Yoga should try to mature!
And those who are not matured and are troubling, don't worry about it.
You should have pity – you really need to have pity for such people that they're so immature!
Today is something great I feel because thirty years
I've been running up-and down everywhere
and I have been able to gather so many people, there are so many Sahaja Yogis you see.
And also all over the world this is just a wee bit of that
So...this something was happened has already described
Has been prophesied by peopIe
That such-and-such thing will happen
that so many people will get their Self-realization.
Unbelievable it was, of course!
But as now you see how sweet is the feeling
–that we are all one
there's no quarrel and fight
No bad ideas
And nobody likes cheap things
They want to have something
that is pleasing and has a quality of understanding.
I've seen people becoming poets, writing beautiful poetry
have see people become orators
also i' ve se peop ebecoming very good organizers
but one thing is very important
I said in the beginning, and again I would say what will appeal to people is your humility.
You should be a humble person – not think that you are something special or
not think that you are some sort of a, I should say self-important person.
Once You Think That Your Important then your part and parcel is not the whole thing if
my one hand starts thinking i am important it's stupid how can 1hand be important
All hands are needed, everything is needed.
Legs all need it
How can one part be so important?
If you start thinking like that anywhere
in your journey of Sahaja Yoga
then I must say
You're not on the Sahajavastana
So My own effort was
to take into That beautiful arena
of Sahaja Yoga, where you will be absolutely one with yourself –
One is the nature.
The people who are around You
With your own country and countries
everywhere…the whole atmosphere as they say
the whole Brahman becomes part and parcel
And you're not separated from that
Then they, we can say the egos – they call ninad.
The egos of your being…of you life
Can be easily seen not in material advancement
or any other kind a thing
but
In spiritual area which is highest
Or everywhere and every country
there have been people with that quality
and till today they are all remembered.
In the same way you will be representing a very great knowledge about reality in your
life, in creation or working – in everyway you can do it!
Now only thing that we have to decide is how many people we're going
give Realization. What we can do for realization? What should
be done?" This is the only thing if you go on with your complete
emancipation, will be done! You'll be surprised it's like
time being a big mountain but when
Once you have reached to the peak, you can see everything very well and if he is so satisfied
that You are at The Peak.
So that climbing part even some of who has do it – It's all right there no problem
,you must respect for yourself love your self an understanding that we had reach The
Peak, Peak Of The Mountain . And once you've reached The Peak Of The Mountain
And then you start showering all your love, affection and everything that flows down the
mountain.
That is life for him – it's a greatest type of life!
Forget about other people, politicians or any others who were supposed to be great
forget them. You are much higher than that, because you're already chiseled like a diamond
with the Sahaja style of life which is very satisfying and also it's very much absolutely
peace-giving – It gives joy! It give us peace! It gave us capabilities!
It gives you so many things that you cannot count, like the thousand petals of your Sahasrara
which are enlightened.
God knows what all can have with this!
This is such a tremendous area You're in – the Thousand Petals and from there people
I've gained knowledge about science, knowledge…all the great discoveries are
from there. So this is what one has to realize, one's own esteem – self-esteem
—is different form Self-Importance! You should have self-esteem with that you'll
become humble and very loving because we are capable of love
And it is not forced one.
I agree that from the ocean,
The clouds rise and then they give rain
But It's in cycle of life
They are doing
They don't think
Because
You're out
Of the cycle
And still you are doing work without any feeling of self-importance.
You're doing because have to do it, another cycle – not the natural cycle but
other cycle for awareness where your aware as what
we were going at that same time very humble
You are very loving, you're very kind.
Don't shout and don' t beat anyone
.You do not say anything harsh to any one
And can manage the most difficult person
If somebody tries be funny
,you always raise Kundalini
and be satisfied with it
if you secretly raise the kundalini
The other persons is finished
If you cannot raise it, then forget It.
Forget that He is a difficult person – You know its'a stone now in the stone what can
we do?
We cannot make it through love and dignity or these qualities…
…it's not possible from a Stone hearted person so forget That's Not your job.
That's not your job at all.
So I would request that, first of all we should see how much humble you are – You
have to be very humble and this is Your decoration which is Your beauty!
So you have your love, which is pure without any lust or greed.
You…you'll know others only because
you are in Love and then secondly
you're blessed with peace
– absolutely at Peace with yourself
And will be amazed with Peace, wisdom will come into
You will be regarded as the wisest man, wisest woman because you are at peace with yourself.
Only in Peace can discover truth and every solution that we want to become very wise
and sensible person, outstandingly great than others.
You are not like common general people!
Then you have joy –
Joy is something cannot express in words but still
Joy as I've told many a times it's singular
It isn't unhappiness or happiness
It is just joy, just you enjoy.
You enjoy everything – every company
uh…every incident
…every scene
Every happening in your life
—you know how to enjoy it
See! Just Joy has a great capacity
Once I remember
...I had gone with my son-in-law and daughter
To see some historical place
We have to climb a lot
We were climbing for about three hours.
So naturally we all got tired and there was a little resting place made of marble, so
he said let's spread out our sun here!
So when I spread it out, you see they were so much saying why should we have come here
of all the things this and that.
They're grudging!
Then suddenly –you know?
This is a joy point–suddenly
I saw carvings of elephants
So I said, can you see these elephants?
Everybody's tail is differently made.
They said, Mommy how could You see the elephant tails we are so tired!
And He says do also just seeing that because this joy what it shifts
shifts your mind from nonsense
You see, you just say it's all nonsense.
Just shift your mind – this is the way to get joy and goes with a thing that will join
them!
Supposing there was person who quite boring then what happens?
We'll just…see the humor behind boring how every persons bores him
And What we learn out of it never bore anyone
So, this joy has a specialty that it teaches you the essence of Joy Of Everything.
If its say bad friend alright?
Still your enjoy because see how Bad It Is.
Supposing off course if Its A Good Friend Then You Can Always See
But Do Not Go On With Your Mind How To Criticize
This criticism business goes out of your mind.
So what happens,
Your Mind shifts immediately
from something that's ridiculous
to some thing interesting in the same way
so you don't criticize
and You do not feel bad about it
Sometimes
It is so happened
That people are amazed
how I tolerate such a person
When i am not tolerating
I'm not paying any attention, whatever the person may be doing.
If you are of that nature – let us call as a condition where…where
You're absolutely in the Turiya state.
So Kabir has said, Jab mast huye phir kya bolhe?
When have gone into That State Of Joy why should I say anything?"
It is like that, a temperament which you have to understand and respect it.
That's within your but respected – do not compare with others!
Others are at different level so just try enjoy never feel something higher or greater
No, never feel.
What you should feed that thankfulness?
That You are not mixed up with all those funny ideas and funny style of life where
go on criticizing, this is not good. I don't like it! Who are you? You don' t know yourself.
When say that they do ntlikeit ,you're not knowing your self . How d o y ou kno what
yo dont liek ? And i've seen people with very poor knowledge who just a little bit
here and there or very critical of others. I dunno the reason why its so but maybe
that they think no end of themselves.
But this is what, it's very common but if you know the absolute knowledge then
You become really humble absolutely humble and sweet gentle
And kind so today Is a great day otherwise for Me also I didn't
Know That i'll survive So many years to see This beautiful
Because, after all it was very hard life according to other standards.
But what is most joy-giving for Me
Was creating Sahaja Yogis and listening them
And talking with the way they were so sweet
So kind and respectful
All this has helped me so much
and I must thank you for that.
With your support, with Your help
–with your understanding–
…I could achieve it!
If… if i could have achieved on my own
—i would never had asked
...for this health of yours
but You are just like My hand
You're Just Like My eyes
And... I need You very much
because without You I cannot do it
It's like channelizing
Unless & until we are channels
What's the use of being Adi Shakti or anything, how will you channelize it?
If there is electrical movement we need channels.
Otherwise It Is a static thing
In The same way I felt always
that i needed more and More Channels
And even when it worked out
was really, Really in A very Great Spirit
So, I thank you very much again for this day that has come and bless from my heart.
That now You take over responsibility – you are a Sahaja Yogi so have the responsibility
also to give realizations too others don't keep it yourself!
This is given by other people and can explain or talk with them.
You can really very well understand, try to
understand them and talk with him
And you must give realizations for this.
Otherwise we won't feel complete
To be completely you have do that
May God bless y'all
Children from 13-16
That Tridisi Asirishyani
Up to 18 years.
Ava dhātāraṁ ava nuchān namava śiṣyam.
Ava paśyatāt, avapūras tām.
Avotara tām, avadakṣināttām.
Avachor dvātāt, avadhara tām.
sarvatomam pahi-pahi samantah tvam vangmayas tvam cinmayaha
tvam anandamayastvampramhamaya
tvamsacidananda dvitiyosih
tvam pratyaksha prahmasi
Vam jnanamayo vidjnana mayosih
Sarvam jagadidam tvato jayate
Sarvam jagadidam tvatastishthati
Sarvam jagadidam tvai layameshati
Sarvam jagadidam tvayi prathetih Vambho mirako nalo nilo nabhaha
Tvam chatvarivah padani Tvam goonatrayateethaha
Vam deha trayati taha, vam kala traya ti taha.
Vam muladhara sthitosi nitya, vam shaktitrayatma kahaa
Tvam yogi no dhayanti nityaṁ, tvam brahmā, tvam viṣṇo, tvam rudra, tvam indra, tvam
agni, tvam vāyu, tvam sūrya, tvam candra mā, tvam prāmahor bhuvasvarom.
dhanādīṁ purva mūccharyam varṇādīṁ tadanantaram
anusvāraḥ paratarah
ardhen dulasitam tārenarhaddam
etattava manuśvarūpam
KAKARAH PURVARUPAM AKARO MADDHAMA RUPAM
ANUSVARASH CHANDARUPAM BINDURA RUTTARUPAM
NADAHSANDHANAM SAIHITASANDHIHI
SAISHA GANESHA VIDYA GANAKARSHIHI
Nichrot, Gayatri, Chandaha, Ganapati, Devataam.
Om Ganga, Ganapataye Namah.
Jagatkaranam Achutamm, Aavirbhootamsa Srushtyadau, Prakrutepurushath Paramb evam dhayanthiyomittahm
Sayogi yoginam varaha namo vratapataye namogana pataye
Namah, pramadhapadaye namaste astu lambodharayai kadantaya
Vignanashine shivasudhaye Sri varada murdaye namo namaha
